name: Delhi
description: India's capital and largest content creation market with agencies, startups, and creators across every niche.

name: New Delhi
description: Central Delhi hub for corporate offices, embassies, and premium brand content production.

name: Noida
description: Fast-growing corporate and tech hub with strong demand for video and podcast content.

name: Gurugram
description: Fortune 500 headquarters and startup ecosystem driving corporate video and photography needs.

name: Gurgaon
description: Alias for Gurugram — major corporate and MNC content production center.

name: Faridabad
description: Industrial and manufacturing hub with growing demand for product photography and corporate films.

name: Ghaziabad
description: Eastern NCR city with retail, education, and healthcare content production needs.

name: Dwarka
description: Sub-city of Delhi where DyWix studio is located — ideal for West Delhi creators.

name: South Delhi
description: Premium residential and commercial district with fashion, lifestyle, and influencer content demand.

name: East Delhi
description: Dense commercial area with strong small business and D2C brand photography needs.

name: West Delhi
description: Closest Delhi zone to DyWix studio with easy metro and road access.

name: North Delhi
description: University and retail hub with educational and youth-focused content demand.

name: Greater Noida
description: Expanding residential and industrial zone with corporate and real estate content needs.

name: Sonipat
description: Emerging NCR extension with education and manufacturing content requirements.

name: Bahadurgarh
description: Industrial town on Delhi border with product and corporate photography demand.

name: Meerut
description: Eastern UP city with manufacturing and education content production.

name: Panipat
description: Textile and industrial hub with product photography demand.

name: Rohtak
description: Education hub with coaching and institutional video content needs.

name: Karnal
description: Agricultural and industrial city on NH-44 with corporate content needs.

name: Palwal
description: Southern Haryana town with logistics and manufacturing content demand.

name: Manesar
description: Industrial belt adjacent to Gurugram with automotive and manufacturing content.

name: Vasant Kunj
description: Premium South Delhi residential and mall district.

name: Central Delhi
description: Government and heritage district with institutional content needs.

name: Shahdara
description: Eastern Delhi transit hub with retail and wholesale markets.

name: Mayur Vihar
description: Residential hub on Delhi-Noida border with family and education content.

name: Laxmi Nagar
description: Coaching and education hub in East Delhi.

name: Janakpuri
description: Major West Delhi residential and commercial center.

name: Rajouri Garden
description: Popular West Delhi market and metro hub.

name: Pitampura
description: North West Delhi residential and TV tower landmark area.

name: Rohini
description: Large planned sub-city in North West Delhi.

name: Vasundhara
description: Ghaziabad residential hub popular with families and professionals.

name: Indirapuram
description: Premium Ghaziabad township with retail and residential content demand.

description: Growing Ghaziabad extension with new residential projects.

description: Southern Faridabad industrial area.
